_comment: Static rotation table for Zapier-based Pinterest auto-pinner. Index = day-of-year % len(pins) (deterministic, no state file needed). Images hosted publicly in this same midwestmade4u-pins repo. MIRRORED HERE (public repo) on 2026-07-03 because the private midwestmade4u-shop copy requires an auth token on every raw.githubusercontent.com fetch, which scheduled tasks cannot supply -- this public copy is the primary source SKILL.md fetches from. Keep in sync with midwestmade4u-shop/tracking/pinterest_zapier_pins.json (editorial source of truth) whenever a pin is added. Bundle pins (021-027) point to a dedicated 'Disney Trip Planning Bundles' board (id 1078612248196086848) as of 2026-07-03. New-products batch (028-033) added 2026-07-05. | UPDATED 2026-07-07: added tracking_url per pin (GH Pages redirect at /r/{stem}.html) for UTM attribution + click counting via abacus.jasoncameron.dev (keyless free hit counter, no auth needed). Scheduled tasks should now use tracking_url as the pin's source_url/pin_source_url instead of listing_url directly. | UPDATED 2026-07-07 (Phase 1b): fresh-pin variation factory. Every listing now has 5 structurally distinct designs (v1=original, v2=problem-first, v3=stat-led, v4=quick-facts grid, v5=question-hook) -- different layout/hook/visual anchor each, not color tweaks. Retires the small 34-image pool that Pinterest's 2026 fresh-pin bias was suppressing.

_video_comment: video_url (added 2026-07-03) is a relative path in THIS repo (repo_raw_base + video_url = full public mp4 URL) for the Buffer-based video-pin poster. Only 3 sample pins have video_url so far (Phase 1 sample test) -- full rollout pending Matt's review of the sample videos. Buffer posting config: organizationId 6a48235d7add101768ce2235, channelId 6a4823da5ab6d2f106a03198 ('midwestmade4u Pinterest Business'). Buffer's internal board ids (pin_subprofile) differ from Pinterest's native board_id above -- see buffer_board_map for the name-based translation.

buffer_board_map._comment: Maps this file's Pinterest board_id (native Pinterest API id) to Buffer's internal pin_subprofile id, matched by board NAME since the two systems use different ids for the same board.

_tracking_comment: tracking_url = GH Pages redirect page that logs a click (abacus.jasoncameron.dev, 3 keys: per-pin, per-listing, site-total) then 302s to listing_url with UTM params (utm_source=pinterest&utm_medium=pin&utm_campaign={listing_slug}&utm_content={pin_file_stem}). Read counts anytime via GET https://abacus.jasoncameron.dev/get/mm4u-listing/{slug} (no auth). This is the tracker backbone -- independent of Pinterest/Etsy APIs.
_rotation_comment: No persistent 'posted' ledger file -- instead a deterministic GLOBAL sequential walk (days-since-epoch * 3 + slot_offset, epoch 2026-01-01) indexes into the weighted pin list, so every one of the ~170 pins gets used before any repeat (~40+ day full cycle at 3 posts/day), with zero write-back risk from ephemeral scheduled-task runs. Functionally equivalent to a no-repeat ledger without needing one.
